Guide a User Through Simple Test Selection

Source: R/guided_test.R
guided_test.Rd

Starts a simple branching workflow. In interactive sessions the function asks a small number of questions. In scripts, the same answers can be supplied as a named list.

Usage

guided_test(data, answers = NULL, run = "recommend", language = "en")

Arguments

data

A data frame.

answers

Optional named list of answers for non-interactive use.

run

One of "recommend" or "run".

language

"en" or "ja".

Value

A statsguider_decision object, or a statsguider_result object when run = "run".

On this page
